title: Pretty Panes
body:
**Pretty Panes** is a resource pack that changes textures of stained glass blocks and stained glass panes. This project was inspired by the cottagecore aesthetic and to an extent Cocricot and various other resource packs changing glass textures. Pretty Panes was designed to be used primarily in smaller builds, e.g. cottages, chapels and small houses.

- white and light gray glass now have white frames,
- black and gray glass now have black, iron-styled frames,
- other coloured glass variants now have middle ages-themed frames.

In the future, I plan to add alternative versions of this resource pack, featuring varied textures for coloured glass and various other tweaks to textures.
